title: pilosella subcymiflora
intro: Pilosella subcymiflora, also known as sub-cymiflora or false oxeye daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant and antifungal properties. Pilosella subcymiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and other health conditions.
